note: As-built: the CLI as a persistent-session lifecycle manager over the one /gogo:go skill, with the owner lock, session registry, reap/sweep, and the shipped cli/internal/orchestrator type structure.

diagrams.title: gogo go/plan control flow — lock guard → launch-or-resume the persistent claude -p → classify exit → reap/sweep
Two orchestrators over one skill — CLI session manager spawns claude -p '/gogo:go', the skill runs implement in-context + Task review/test + report
Session lifecycle — none → running → parked/awaiting-uat (resume) → shipped/orphaned → reaped
As-built structure — Session manager + Registry/PersistentSession, Lock/Owner, Sweeper, and the injectable SessionRunner/AttachFn/LivenessFn seams
